name: aiorussound

metadata.name: aiorussound
metadata.summary: Asyncio client for Russound RIO devices.

documentation:
# aiorussound #### An async python package for interfacing with Russound RIO hardware [**📖 Read the docs »**][docs] [![](https://github.com/noahhusby/aiorussound/actions/workflows/publish.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/noahhusby/aiorussound/actions/workflows/build.yml) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/license/noahhusby/aiorussound)](https://github.com/noahhusby/aiorussound/blob/main/LICENSE) [![](https://img.shields.io/pypi/implementation/aiorussound )](https://pypi.org/project/aiorussound/) [![](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/aiorussound )](https://pypi.org/project/aiorussound/) [![](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/aiorussound )](https://pypi.org/project/aiorussound/)
This module implements a Python client for the Russound I/O (RIO) protocol used to control Russound audio controllers. RIO supports a superset of the RNET feature set, allows for push notifications of system changes and supports TCP/IP and RS232 communication. ## Supported Devices - Russound MBX-PRE - Russound MBX-AMP - Russound MCA-C3 - Russound MCA-C5 - Russound MCA-66 - Russound MCA-88 - Russound MCA-88x - Russound XSource (untested) - Russound XZone4 (untested) - Russound XZone70V (untested) - Russound XStream-X5 (untested) - Russound ACA-E5 (untested) If your model is not on the list of supported devices, and everything works correctly then add it to the list by opening a pull request. ## Communication The library supports the RIO protocol communication over TCP/IP or RS232 (Serial). ### TCP/IP The built-in ethernet port on the Russound device natively support the RIO protocol. **Note:** It is strongly recommended that the controller has a static IP address configured. ### RS232 (Serial) The RS232 port must be configured to use the RIO protocol instead of the RNET protocol for the library to function properly. This can be configured using the SCS-C5 configuration tool or the controller's Web GUI. ## Acknowledgements This is the continuation of the `russound_rio` package. This wouldn't be possible without the excellent work from [@wickerwaka](https://github.com/wickerwaka) and [@chphilli](https://github.com/chphilli). [docs]: https://noahhusby.github.io/aiorussound/

modules.name: aiorussound.const
documentation: Asynchronous Python client for Russound RIO.

classes.name: aiorussound.const.FeatureFlag
documentation: A list of Russound RIO API features.

modules.name: aiorussound.exceptions
documentation: Asynchronous Python client for Russound RIO.

classes.name: aiorussound.exceptions.CommandError
documentation: A command sent to the controller caused an error.

classes.name: aiorussound.exceptions.UncachedVariableError
documentation: A variable was not found in the cache.

classes.name: aiorussound.exceptions.UnsupportedFeatureError
documentation: A requested command is not supported on this controller.

classes.name: aiorussound.exceptions.UnsupportedRussoundVersionError
documentation: The client implements an unsupported version of the Russound RIO API.

modules.name: aiorussound.util
documentation: Asynchronous Python client for Russound RIO.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.raise_unsupported_feature
documentation:
Raise an UnsupportedFeature exception if the specified feature is not supported
in the provided version.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.is_feature_supported
documentation:
Return true if the feature is supported in the provided version,
false otherwise.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.is_fw_version_higher
documentation: Return true if fw_a is greater than or equal to fw_b.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.controller_device_str
documentation: Return a string representation of the specified controller device.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.zone_device_str
documentation: Return a string representation of the specified zone device.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.source_device_str
documentation: Return a string representation of the specified source device.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.get_max_zones
documentation: Return a maximum number of zones supported by a specific controller.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.is_rnet_capable
documentation: Return whether a controller is rnet capable.

functions.name: aiorussound.util.map_rio_to_dict
documentation: Maps a RIO variable to a python dictionary.

methods.name: aiorussound.connection.RussoundConnectionHandler.send
documentation: Send a command to the Russound client.

methods.name: aiorussound.connection.RussoundTcpConnectionHandler.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the Russound object using the event loop, host and port
provided.

methods.name: aiorussound.connection.RussoundTcpConnectionHandler.send
documentation: Send a command to the Russound client.

modules.name: aiorussound.rio
documentation: Asynchronous Python client for Russound RIO.

classes.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the Russound object using the event loop, host and port
provided.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.connect
documentation: Connect to the controller and start processing responses.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.is_connected
documentation: Return True if device is connected.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.process_response
documentation: Process an incoming string of bytes into a RussoundMessage

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.set_variable
documentation: Set a zone variable to a new value.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.get_variable
documentation:
Retrieve the current value of a zone variable.  If the variable is
not found in the local cache then the value is requested from the
controller.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient._load_zone_source_exclusion
documentation: Loads whether a source is available to a specific zone.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.RussoundClient.supported_features
documentation: Gets a list of features supported by the controller.
Manages the RIO connection to a Russound device.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.ZoneControlSurface.send_event
documentation: Send an event to a zone.

methods.name: aiorussound.rio.ZoneControlSurface.fetch_current_source
documentation: Return the current source as a source object.

classes.name: aiorussound.rio.Controller
documentation: Data class representing a Russound controller.
